instructions.purpose: Create field-level reviewed labels for the fixed Supabase feedback development set.
instructions.corrected_title_rule: corrected_title_hint is a review hint only and must not be copied as ground truth without visual or trusted-source evidence.
instructions.required_distinction: Use FACT_CORRECTION when a card fact changes; use TITLE_STYLE_CHANGE when only wording/order/style changes.
